style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an overhead view of an open Bible on a worn wooden table, with a rusted iron cross and a steaming coffee cup beside it, lit by warm lamplight
subject.focal_point: the rusted iron cross catching amber reflections
subject.secondary: Nothing modern except the coffee cup; background desaturated shows empty armchair and night window

composition.foreground: Bible, cross, and lamplight in saturated warm ochre-gold
composition.background: desaturated armchair and night window visible at edges

mood.emotion: invitation to see what the church ignores

symbolism.primary: the viewer invited into prophetic reading
symbolism.secondary: rusted cross as enduring faith amid collapse

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
